title: Agrostis pallescens
taxonomy: Agrostis pallescens belongs to the family Poaceae, which includes various types of grasses. This plant is further classified as a member of the genus Agrostis, a group of grasses commonly found in temperate regions. The species Agrostis pallescens is a type of grass that is native to certain parts of the world. It is closely related to other species within the Agrostis genus, such as Agrostis canina and Agrostis stolonifera. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Agrostis pallescens from other similar species.
